sections.paragraph:
an unused root, perhaps of the same or similar meaning to רָחַם to cherish. Secondary and denom. is the Arab. رخل Conj. V. to possess lambs. [In Thes. this is compared with رَحَلَ to wander, to journey, especially with camels.]

רחל

f.-

(1) a ewe, Gen 31:38 32:15 hence any sheep, Isa 53:7 Son 6:6. (Arab. رَخِلُ, رِخْلُ a female lamb.)

(2) [Rachel, Rahel], pr.n. of the wife of Jacob, Gen 29:6 Jer 31:15.
